project.name: Lucindri (parent reactor)
project.description: Aggregator POM: a single `mvn install` here builds every Lucindri module in dependency order. Maven derives the order from the inter-module dependencies (analyzer is built before the searcher/indexer that depend on it), so no build order needs to be documented by hand. Build one module with `mvn -pl LucindriSearcher -am install`. (TASK-0021)
